Just a month before the disaster I had visited a Science Centre built by them! 💔 It's called "TDF Magnifi Science Centre" look at the photos/videos and see for yourself how truly passionate they were about science and exploration. The Dawood family is very philanthropic and have built many schools, universities, hospitals etc. They weren't just "rich guys" looking for a thrill. They were genuinely interested in titanic/deep sea exploration.
reply_content: @StephSixPeople take risks all the time - skydiving, bungee jumping, rock climbing, roller coasters, etc. Most of the time you have to trust that another person or company knows what they’re doing (the dude packing your parachute, the company who made it, the pilot etc) . It’s not like you screen the flight log of a skydiving plane pilot to see if they have incidents or check the plane maintenance records and construction materials. You have to trust and take risks to actually live and do things. Stockton failed these people and was a convincing fast talker with 100 million of venture capital behind him. The passengers on board weren’t stupid, they just took a risk and unfortunately put their trust in the wrong person.
